title: nazar's teamwork
description: a self-assignable teams datapack for java 1.21, designed for geyser servers
body:
this datapack lets players choose between PVE, PVP, Streamer, and Mob teams without mod intervention. it has a safeguard to prevent spam abuse during fights. it has two different ways to select teams, two of which work on bedrock and one of which can be enabled by uncommenting a line in team_prompt. (debug apples)

it is meant for vanilla java and geyser. it works in singleplayer and on servers. it works with fabric but not paper.

to use this pack, use the triggers: n_reset_team, n_select_pve, n_select_pvp, n_select_streamer, n_select_mob.

to uninstall the pack, use /function nazars_teamwork:uninstall

to install the pack, use /function nazars_teamwork:load

team summaries:
pve, friendly fire off
pvp, friendly fire on
streamer, pvp but with a tag denoting the user is recording
mob, pve but also mobs (mostly) ignore you (for pseudo-peaceful in mixed setting)
